subcodes.first_line: This Book speaketh the truth, and therein mention is made of a handmaiden among the handmaidens of God who believed in her Lord and detached herself from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه یذکر امه من اماء الله التی آمنت بربها و انقطعت عن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
